name: Arcane Chalk Fragment
description: A chipped stick of silvery chalk used for ward circles and memory-binding sigils.

name: Barracks Keyring
description: Iron keys for holding lockers, armory racks, and patrol report cabinets.

name: Bent Lockpick Set
description: A wrapped set of picks missing one fine hook, likely used hard against stubborn locks.

name: Bronze Fountain Coin
description: A battered bronze coin wedged between the stones of the central fountain.

name: Carved Driftwood Charm
description: A piece of pale driftwood carved into the shape of a curling wave, hung on a faded blue cord. It smells faintly of incense and sea-salt.

name: Cellar Brass Ring
description: A brass keyring with one polished key worn smooth from daily use at the Copper Cup storeroom door.

name: Cracked Spyglass
description: A once-fine brass spyglass with a hairline crack across one lens. It smells faintly of salt and oil and bears tiny etchings matching the town's crest.

name: Frayed Mooring Rope
description: A length of mooring rope stained a darker color near one end. Up close, the fibers look as though they were cut more than worn through by the sea.

name: Guard's Lost Signet
description: A small silver signet ring bearing the town's crest, scuffed as though it has been dragged along stone. It looks recently dropped.

name: Hidden Alley Knife
description: A narrow-bladed knife tucked behind a loose brick at knee height. Its handle is wrapped in worn blue cloth, and a faint rust stain darkens the edge.

name: Hidden Scrap
description: A grease-stained note tucked behind a loose crate: 'cellar restock / upstairs lock is our wedding anniversary date'.

name: Night Patrol Logbook
description: A worn ledger listing patrol routes with several entries crossed out and rewritten.

name: Salt-Stained Prayer Beads
description: A loop of smooth wooden beads, crusted with a thin line of salt where they rest against wet robes. Some of the beads are carved with tiny wave symbols.

name: Shattered Lantern Glass
description: A pouch of carefully collected lantern shards from the bridge, some edges marked with dried reddish residue.

name: Silver Memory Vial
description: A stoppered silver vial etched with runes designed to hold a single memory imprint for later restoration.

name: Smugglers' Ledger
description: A slim ledger bound in cracked leather, its pages filled with coded notes about shipments, routes, and initials. A few entries are smudged with what looks like river-mud.

name: Wax-Sealed Incident Packet
description: A tied packet of witness statements and guard notes marked for the mayors desk.

name: Weathered Notice
description: A curling parchment describing strange lights and disturbances near the old well.

name: Woodcutter's Axe
description: A heavy ash-wood axe with a nicked steel head. The haft has fresh grip marks and old dark staining near the pommel.
